audit_items.proof_trace: All allocation sites in the file are properly freed on every path: nfp_nsp_open() handles are paired with nfp_nsp_close() via goto labels (exit_close_nsp) in nfp_port_get_module_info and nfp_port_get_module_eeprom; nfp_eth_config_start() in nfp_net_set_link_ksettings is always cleaned up by either nfp_eth_config_commit_end (which internally calls nfp_eth_config_cleanup_end→nfp_nsp_close+kfree) or nfp_eth_config_cleanup_end on error; nfp_resource_acquire() in nfp_dump_nsp_diag is always paired with nfp_resource_release() via exit_release label; dp kmalloc'd by nfp_net_clone_dp in nfp_net_set_ring_size and nfp_net_set_num_rings is always freed by nfp_net_ring_reconfig which has kfree(dp) on all exit paths (exit_free_dp and err_cleanup_vecs).
